hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q get_project_context; then exit 0; fi; RESOLVED=$(realpath "$PWD"); LOCK=/tmp/smm-session-$(printf "%s" "$RESOLVED" | shasum | cut -c1-8).lock; FRESH=$(find "$LOCK" -mmin -30 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FRESH" ]; then echo "⚠️ AXIOM HUB: Call get_project_context first." >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'echo "[Axiom Hub] Did you make an architectural choice? If so, call add_decision before continuing." >&2; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "git commit"; then HASH=$(printf "%s" "$PWD" | shasum | cut -c1-8); rm -f /tmp/smm-session-$HASH.lock /tmp/smm-review-$HASH.lock; echo "[Axiom Hub] Session complete. Next task will require fresh context load." >&2; fi; exit 0'
